/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/OpenSynth_VST3.dir/link.d  -o OpenSynth_artefacts/Release/VST3/OpenSynth.vst3/Contents/x86_64-linux/OpenSynth.so CMakeFiles/OpenSynth_VST3.dir/home/synth/projects/juce/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenSynth_VST3.dir/home/synth/projects/juce/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenSynth_VST3.dir/home/synth/projects/juce/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_ARA.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenSynth_VST3.dir/home/synth/projects/juce/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_LV2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenSynth_VST3.dir/home/synth/projects/juce/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Standalone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenSynth_VST3.dir/home/synth/projects/juce/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Unity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenSynth_VST3.dir/home/synth/projects/juce/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenSynth_VST3.dir/home/synth/projects/juce/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST3.cpp.o  OpenSynth_artefacts/Release/libOpenSynth_SharedCode.a /usr/lib/libasound.so /usr/lib/libfontconfig.so /usr/lib/libfreetype.so -lrt /usr/lib/libGL.so -lpthread -ldl
